summary: Concept-tag transcendental-magic chunks into the live graph (local Qwen3.5-27B)
description:
Bring the 219 transcendental-magic chunks (doctrine 96 + ritual 123, ingested under todo:bd94d820 but not yet in the DB) through the tagging pipeline: graph bootstrap -> tag_concepts -> staged-tag review. Provider: llamacpp with the local Qwen3.5-27B server (already running), matching the original corpus tagging provider.

Scope: tagging only. embed_corpus and propose_edges stay deferred (embeddings are not a tag_concepts dependency — they feed edge proposals). The work-grouping.md census note 'not yet in DB' gets updated when bootstrap lands.

Promotion path per standing policy (2026-07-14): NO auto_promote, at any score tier. All staged tags go through the /guru-review-tags queue-only review flow (guru-review web app HTTP API); the operator retains the final apply gate.
